Document:
# Magic & Spell Systems Reference
Quick reference for the magic and spell systems in OpenEdge 14.
## Key Components
[bold]OE14SpellStorageComponent[/bold] — attached to items; holds a list of spell action IDs that are granted when the item is equipped.
[bold]OE14ActionManaCostComponent[/bold] — attached to spell actions; defines the mana cost and validates mana before the spell fires.
[bold]OE14MagicEnergyComponent[/bold] — attached to characters; tracks current and maximum mana.
## Spell Flow
1. Player equips item with [mono]OE14SpellStorage[/mono] 2. Spells are added to action bar 3. Player activates spell 4. [mono]OE14ActionManaCostSystem[/mono] checks mana 5. If sufficient: deducts mana, spell fires 6. If not: rejects with message
## File Locations
- [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/Magic/[/mono] - [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Magic/[/mono] - [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Magic/[/mono]
## Content Under Construction
Full magic system reference coming soon. See [textlink="Spell Mechanics" link="OE14_DEV_Skills_Mechanics"] for the conceptual overview.
